title: Validate collection wrappers with TryFrom
scenario: An order without lines is invalid. TryFrom<Vec<OrderLine>> can enforce that invariant at the wrapper boundary.
instructions: The starter already defines OrderLinesError. Implement TryFrom<Vec<OrderLine>> for OrderLines and return OrderLinesError::Empty when the vector has no lines.

hints.body: Return Err(OrderLinesError::Empty) for an empty vector and Ok(Self::new(lines)) otherwise.
One complete solution for Validate collection wrappers with TryFrom is shown below.

completionExplanation: TryFrom adds a checked construction path for callers that must reject empty line collections, while the earlier iteration APIs remain intact.
